title: Who was Mark Lifman?
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Who was Mark Lifman (57), the man that was gunned down in the parking area of the Garden Route Mall in George today?

• Lifman was a prominent figure in South Africa's alleged organised crime circles.


> • He was facing multiple serious charges, including murder, attempted murder, money laundering, and gang-related offences.


• Lifman was involved in alleged underworld battles for the control of nightclubs.

• He had been charged with the murder of Brian Wainstein, who was gunned down in his Constantia home in August 2017.

• Lifman’s activities have been under scrutiny for years, and his name is frequently mentioned alongside other high-profile figures, such as Jerome 'Donkie' Booysen and Nafiz Modack, due to alleged involvement in gang networks and violence within the Cape Town area.

• Lifman was due to appear in the Western Cape High Court on Monday.

• On the day of the alleged assassination, Lifman was reportedly in George to play golf.

• It is alleged that he was alone at the time of the shooting.

• He was known to have bodyguards whenever he appeared in public. It is not yet known why he was alone on the day of the shooting.

Previous articles:

- Underworld figure Mark Lifman shot and killed at Garden Route Mall
- Shooting at Garden Route Mall

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
